description: A 'Consumer Shopping Habits 2025' survey has been drafted, but the structure is logically incorrect and ethical settings are wrong. Reorder the question groups to follow the sequence: 'Informed Consent', 'Shopping Habits', and 'Demographics'. Configure the 'Consent Agreement' question (Code: CONSENT1) in the Informed Consent group as mandatory and the 'Annual Household Income' question (Code: DEMO_INC) in the Demographics group as optional to respect respondent privacy.
